description: Intelligence suggests a suspect copied files between a USB drive and a camera storage card. Corroborate this by identifying files duplicated across disk images /home/ga/evidence/ntfs_undel.dd and /home/ga/evidence/jpeg_search.dd using MD5 hash matching in an Autopsy case named 'Cross_Device_Analysis_2024' (Case Number: 'INV-COR-005'). Document the findings in /home/ga/Reports/correlation_report.txt, including the count of regular files in each source (SOURCE_1_FILES, SOURCE_2_FILES) and the cross-device matches (CROSS_DEVICE_MATCHES) formatted as 'MATCH: <md5_hash> | <filename_in_source1> | <filename_in_source2>'. Save a summary to /home/ga/Reports/correlation_summary.txt containing unique file counts (UNIQUE_FILES_SOURCE1, UNIQUE_FILES_SOURCE2), shared file counts (SHARED_FILES), and an investigation conclusion assessing the evidence of file copying.
